title: CELEBRATE RECOVERY - 211info
text: CELEBRATE RECOVERY CELEBRATE RECOVERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a faith-based 12-step recovery program and online search tool to find groups to attend. 1 Saddleback Parkway Lake Forest, CA 92630 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: General Addictions/Substance Use Disorder Support Groups If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
